AI.title: PsiQuantum has a plan to make a massive quantum computer out of light
AI.summary: The machine that could change the world will be housed in a room that looks like a data center crossed with an ice cream factory. Inside will be some 100 stainless-steel cabinets, each about six feet tall and connected to a supply of liquid helium that keeps them only a few degrees above absolute ze…

AI.title: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
AI.summary: OpenAI's first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg. The device apparently won't have a screen, but will use a camera and additional sensors to "understand" your environment. The report comes just days after Apple filed a lawsuit a…

AI.title: SpaceXAI’s Grok programming tool was uploading its users’ entire codebase to cloud storage
AI.summary: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was spotted uploading users' entire codebases to Google Cloud before it was reported, and the company turned it off. The Register reports that Cereblab published findings on Monday showing how the Grok Build CLI was packaging and uploading entire code repositorie…

AI.title: Meta accused of using biased AI targeting for mass layoffs
AI.summary: A group of 26 former Meta employees is suing the company over claims that it used AI tools to unfairly target workers on leave with layoffs, as reported earlier by Reuters. In the lawsuit, the employees allege Meta determined which workers to dismiss based on performance data collected by a "constel…

AI.title: The Google Images homepage will recommend photos even before you search
AI.summary: Google is announcing a big change to the Google Images homepage in honor of the platform's 25th anniversary this week. Instead of a mostly blank page with a search bar, the homepage will soon show you a bunch of images that it thinks you might like before you even start searching. The company says t…

AI.title: Spotify is now an AI chatbot, too
AI.summary: Spotify is experimenting with a new AI feature that allows Premium subscribers to play and explore music, audiobooks, and podcasts by having conversations with a chatbot. The "Talk to Spotify" feature appears across the Home and Now Playing view on Spotify's mobile app. You can interact with the cha…

AI.title: Sam Altman didn’t need another lawsuit
AI.summary: OpenAI has spent the better part of the year involved in lawsuit after lawsuit, including one from the world's richest man. But last Friday, the company was hit with one of the highest-profile legal actions yet - from Apple. OpenAI's expensive hardware bet is what's on the line. Apple's lawsuit agai…

AI.summary: Demis Hassabis thinks the world needs an AI watchdog with the power to hit the brakes if frontier models become too dangerous. Writing in a blog post, the Google DeepMind CEO and cofounder said the US should lead the initiative, arguing that the country is the best place to set global standards "giv…

AI.title: New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium
AI.summary: New hyperscale data centers can't set up shop in New York for up to a year now that Governor Kathy Hochul (D) has signed the nation's first statewide moratorium. But a bill passed by the state legislature that could restrict even more developments still awaits her signature. The order blocks new env…

AI.title: YouTube and X Have Become ‘Gateways’ to Nudify Apps
AI.summary: A new study found that social media platforms are referring people to sites where they can create nonconsensual, sexually explicit deepfakes for as little as $1 an image.

AI.title: This Luddite Puppet Hopes You’re Not Reading This on Your Smartphone
AI.summary: On this week’s episode of The Big Interview podcast, WIRED’s senior culture editor Manisha Krishnan talks to Gowanus about eschewing Big Tech, going outside, and rejection in the age of dating apps.

AI.title: The Chatbot That Foretold Why People Share Secrets With ChatGPT
AI.summary: In the 1960s an MIT professor named Joseph Weizenbaum created a chatbot called ELIZA. The conversations people had with it set precedents for the chatbots to come.

AI.title: DOGE Used AI for Housing Policy. The Government Won’t Say How
AI.summary: In response to a public records request, HUD has withheld documents about DOGE’s use of AI—in part by citing a privilege that doesn’t exist.

游戏.title: Dead Space Creator Glen Schofield Announces Retirement From Gaming Industry
游戏.summary: Dead Space creator Glen Schofield has announced his retirement from the gaming industry.

游戏.title: Halo Studios Reportedly Cancels New Multiplayer Project
游戏.summary: A brand new Halo multiplayer game has been scrapped, according to sources.

游戏.title: Far Cry TV Series Casts Steve Buscemi in Mystery Role
游戏.summary: Steve Buscemi is joining the cast of FX's Far Cry TV series.

游戏.title: Blue Beetle to Return in Superman Sequel Man of Tomorrow
游戏.summary: The Blue Beetle is making a comeback in Man of Tomorrow, with Xolo Maridueña returning to reprise the character after his last appearance in the eponymous 2023 film.

游戏.title: Capcom Gives Monster Hunter Wilds a 'Permanent Price Reduction' as New DLC Bundles Announced
游戏.summary: Hunters, rejoice! Capcom is slashing the price of Monster Hunter Wilds and introducing new DLC bundles — but certain versions of the game are disappearing.

游戏.title: Microsoft Deletes User's 25-Year-Old Account With Thousands Spent on Games and His Son's Baby Pictures After It Was Hacked
游戏.summary: A Microsoft user has lost all of his digital belongings after having his account deleted by the tech giant.

游戏.title: Steam’s Record-Breaking $11 Billion Profit in First Half of 2026 Was Funded Mostly by Older Games
游戏.summary: Steam just had its most profitable period in its entire 22-year history, raking in $11 billion in the last six months — and it's mostly thanks to older games.

游戏.title: Crunchyroll Limits Official Store to Its Most Expensive Subscription Tiers
游戏.summary: Crunchyroll is facing backlash after announcing plans to limit its online store to Mega and Ultimate Fans only, requiring users to pay at least $13.99 per month to spend more money on merch, collectibles, and figurines.

游戏.title: Sony Faces Anti-Trust Lawsuit From Mexican Lawmakers Over Its Decision to End Production of Physical Games
游戏.summary: Lawmakers in Mexico are set to file an anti-trust complaint against Sony due to the company’s controversial decision to stop printing physical games starting January 2028.

游戏.title: The Odyssey Movie Rival Launches This Year, Made Entirely by AI — But Based on Its First Trailer, Christopher Nolan Has Nothing to Worry About
游戏.summary: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey will be rivalled by another movie of the ancient Greek epic this year — made entirely by AI.

游戏.title: PlayStation's FlexStrike Wireless Fight Stick Postponed Due to "Unexpected Production Delays"
游戏.summary: PlayStation has moved back the launch of its FlexStrike wireless fight stick to an as-yet undetermined date due to a lag in production.

游戏.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced's Controversial Day 1 DLC Earned $1 Million, Just on Steam
游戏.summary: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced's controversial $85 collection of day one DLC earned Ubisoft an extra $1 million on Steam, it's been reported.

游戏.title: As England's World Cup Semi-Final Nears, David Beckham Announces He's Joining Fortnite
游戏.summary: England footballing legend David Beckham will soon be available to buy in Fortnite.

游戏.title: Rockstar Should Charge $200 for GTA 6, Analyst Says, as It'll Be 'The Last Great Game' Before Everything is Built Using AI
游戏.summary: Rockstar's $80 price for Grand Theft Auto 6 is less than half what the game is worth, one analyst has suggested.

游戏.title: 'There's Real Nostalgia There' — Riot Has Unveiled League of Legends Classic, but Don't Expect a One-to-One Recreation of the Old Times
游戏.summary: Riot Games has unveiled League of Legends Classic, a new version of its phenomenally successful MOBA designed to tap into nostalgia for the game as it was over 15 years ago.

科技.title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
科技.summary: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

科技.title: Lorde says AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
科技.summary: "Increasingly in our world, it gets harder and harder to know what is real," Lorde said onstage.

科技.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
科技.summary: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."

科技.title: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
科技.summary: OpenAI has issued another statement on the lawsuit, this time suggesting it lacks merit.

科技.title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
科技.summary: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

科技.title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
科技.summary: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.

科技.title: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
科技.summary: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.

科技.title: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
科技.summary: Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

科技.title: Lucid Motors denies report it’s considering bankruptcy
科技.summary: The company said the "rumors are completely false" after its stock sank more than 50% on a report that it was weighing the option.

科技.title: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
科技.summary: Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.

科技.title: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
科技.summary: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI "standards body" modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.

科技.title: DeepSeek reportedly in talks to raise $1.5B, then IPO
科技.summary: DeepSeek, the Chinese large language model developer, is said to be preparing for a 2027 IPO debut as it also looks to raise around $1.5 billion in new funds at a $71 billion valuation.

科技.title: Meta’s Adam Mosseri says AI token budgets could soon be capped per engineer
科技.summary: Instagram head Adam Mosseri believes companies will eventually need to manage AI token spending the same way they manage payroll or other operating expenses, predicting that engineers could soon face limits on how much they spend using AI tools.

科技.title: Google Images gets a Pinterest-like redesign focused on discovery
科技.summary: Now, when users navigate to Google Images, they'll see a "For You" gallery of images tailored to their interests and browsing history.

科技.title: New York State halts construction of all new data centers
科技.summary: New York has become the first state to temporarily halt approval of large data centers, as Gov. Kathy Hochul argues the AI-driven building boom shouldn’t come at the expense of higher electricity costs, water supplies, or local control.
